title: meliosma pinnata subsp. ridleyi
intro: Meliosma pinnata subsp. ridleyi, also known as the ridley meliosma or Malay meliosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Meliosma pinnata subsp. ridleyi include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
